title: Google FULLY FREE Vibe-gravity (VIBE CODE 2.0): FREE & BEST!
summary: Google AI Studio now supports direct Android app generation in the browser, creating Kotlin and Jetpack Compose projects with Gradle files and manifests. A new Design Variations feature generates alternative UI layouts visually, enabling rapid prototyping without detailed design prompts.
writeup: The video covers two additions to Google AI Studio: in-browser Android app generation that produces Kotlin and Jetpack Compose projects with full scaffolding, and a Design Variations feature that generates visual UI layouts without detailed design prompts. It matters because app creation and UI design move directly into the browser through prompt-to-app code generation. The takeaways: Android projects can be scaffolded from a prompt, and UI layouts can be generated as visual variations rather than written out by hand.
